since_last: 58% of 86 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +1.06%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.77% · BTC -3.16% · Gold -2.47% · Nasdaq100 +0.47%. 58% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +1.06%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.06%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UPST is the standout at +6.77%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +6.77%, ZBRA +4.39%, PINS +3.92%, WDAY +3.65%, PATH +3.59%. Laggards: SMR -4.47%, OKLO -4.15%, OKLO -4.15%, QCOM -3.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.30% at $158.15
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.30% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
